factDescription: Living with four feline companions who are firmly in charge. Managing their 'chaotic' energy is the perfect training ground for handling complex, real-world software scenarios.

I’m a dedicated playlist curator. Whether it’s deep-focus lo-fi for debugging sessions or high-energy tracks for deployment days, my YouTube Music library provides the soundtrack for every stage of my development.
I view coding like a Rubik's Cube, it’s all about analyzing patterns, optimizing algorithms, and turning chaos into order. With a personal best for a 3x3 cube of 19 seconds.

A devotee of great storytelling with over 179 series and films completed. Beyond the entertainment, anime provides me with unique perspectives on narrative design, UI aesthetics, and creative problem-solving.
